rationale: In the citing paper, Jiang and Shi (2018) appears in a grouped literature-list sentence about prior market entry/exit research, specifically as an example of work on entrant technology licensing. The paper does not discuss that study's specific mechanism, assumptions, or findings, and it does not build any proposition or model component directly from it. Because the citation serves only broad background positioning without a distinct functional role, this is a mention-only citation.
